label: Together.ai
description: Run inference and fine-tune open-source models via Together.ai's cloud API.

form.title: Connect Together.ai
form.subtitle: Paste your Together.ai API key to enable inference and fine-tuning for open-source models.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Together.ai API key — found in your account dashboard under Settings → API Keys. Simplest and fastest way to connect.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Together.ai API Key

1. Go to [api.together.xyz](https://api.together.xyz) and sign in (or create a free account).
2. Click your avatar or account name in the top-right corner.
3. Navigate to **Settings → API Keys**.
4. Click **Create API Key** (or copy an existing one).
5. Give the key a name like `Anton` and click **Create**.
6. Copy the key — it is shown in full here; you can view it again later from the same page.
7. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- Keep your API key private. Anyone with the key can charge inference costs to your account.
- If you suspect exposure, return to **Settings → API Keys**, revoke the old key, and generate a new one.
- Together.ai charges per token; review your usage on the **Usage** tab in the dashboard.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at api.together.xyz → Settings → API Keys. Treated as a secret and never logged.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Override only if you use a custom or self-hosted Together.ai endpoint. Leave blank to use the default.
